title: Savarin Beef Rouladen
description: A traditional German dish featuring thin slices of beef rolled with a savory filling, served with a rich beef gravy.
instructions: Heat oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened.
Add the sliced beef and cook until browned.
Mix the dried savarin with the flour.
Add the savarin mixture to the beef and stir to combine.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Roll the beef slices into logs and secure with kitchen twine.
Heat the beef broth in a large pot over low heat.
Add the beef rolls to the pot and simmer for 1.5 hours.
Serve the beef rolls with rich beef gravy.
